name: Degoog
author: degoog-org
description: Degoog is a self-hosted meta search aggregator that queries multiple search engines and combines the results. It features a clean interface, support for extensions and plugins, built-in result indexer, and privacy-focused design with no tracking. Ideal for personal or small team use as a privacy-respecting alternative to commercial search engines.

form_fields.label: Settings Password
form_fields.hint: Optional password to protect the settings panel. Leave empty for no password.
